violations.text: Staff was observed washing a blender in handwashing sink in the front service area. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025
The following were observed in poor repair: 1. floor tiles in kitchen (by coolers and dish machine) 2. wall tile by fryer New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement and employee restroom areas. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. All items packed and waiting on disposal removal. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2025
The employee restroom does not have a hand-washing sink. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2025

Raw pork was observed stored above coleslaw in the reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement and employee restroom areas. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2025
The following were observed in poor repair: 1. floor tiles in kitchen (by coolers and dish machine) 2. wall tile by fryer New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025
